title: pelargonium neglectum
intro: Pelargonium neglectum, also known as Red Formed Leucadendron, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium neglectum include relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and providing antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Pelargonium neglectum are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
